# cli 系 3 層への TDDD 適用と既存 linter によるロール配置制約の設定

## Tasks (5/13 resolved)

### S1 — DataRole breaking migration — CompositionRoot and PrimaryAdapter variants

> T001 is the central CN-06 atomic change for this track. Adding CompositionRoot and PrimaryAdapter as unit variants to DataRole triggers exhaustive match requirements across all layers (domain / infrastructure / usecase). The same task extends RoleKind to cover FunctionRole discriminants and teaches catalogue lint evaluation to apply KindLayerConstraint to FunctionEntry items, so the FreeFunction layer rule in T003 is enforceable. Because splitting produces non-CI-passing intermediate states, the entire breaking migration — roles.rs variant additions, RoleKind discriminant additions, strum Display/FromStr, codec DTO wire names, signal evaluator/renderer/all role== comparisons — is bundled into one task.
> The active-track catalogues (domain-types.json drafted in Phase 2) already declare both new variants as action: modify entries. Non-active-track catalogues are write-protected and must not be touched (CN-06 scope limitation).
> After T001, cargo make ci must pass as a standalone CI gate.

- [x] **T001**: DataRole / RoleKind breaking migration — add CompositionRoot and PrimaryAdapter unit variants to DataRole (libs/domain/src/tddd/catalogue_v2/roles.rs). Remove Copy from DataRole (it now has 17 variants; Copy is already absent post-prior-track migration since DataRole is data-carrying; confirm Copy is absent and strum Display/FromStr cover the two new unit variants). Add CompositionRoot and PrimaryAdapter to the existing strum Display/FromStr and variant_name() match arms; keep value_object/entity/aggregate_root/domain_service/use_case constructor signatures and semantics unchanged. Update RoleKind (libs/domain/src/tddd/catalogue_linter.rs) to add CompositionRoot and PrimaryAdapter DataRole discriminants plus FunctionRole discriminants FreeFunction and UseCaseFunction; update from_data_role(), from_contract_role(), add from_function_role(), variant_name(), and internal role arrays. Update evaluate_catalogue_lint / helpers so RuleTarget can match FunctionEntry roles and KindLayerConstraint scans function entries as well as type / trait entries; this is required for the FreeFunction layer rule in T003 to be enforceable. Update usecase parse_role_kind() so lint config target_roles accepts CompositionRoot, PrimaryAdapter, FreeFunction, and UseCaseFunction. Update all callers that exhaustively match DataRole or RoleKind across all three layers: infrastructure signal evaluator (structural_eq.rs, type_signals_evaluator.rs, signal_tags.rs), contract-map renderer (contract_map_renderer_adapter/mod.rs), type-catalogue renderer (type_catalogue_render/entry_details.rs), codec (catalogue_document_codec: dto.rs, decode.rs, encode.rs — extend LintRuleKindDto / DataRoleDto wire names for the two new unit variants and role-target parsing/encoding for FunctionRole discriminants), and any usecase files with exhaustive role matches. Active-track catalogues are in domain-types.json (already updated by Phase 2 type-designer). Non-active-track catalogues are write-protected and must not be touched (CN-06). cargo make ci must pass after this task. (`3a29c82369a50c4859ec28377dcb48b5e9c617e3`)

### S2 — TDDD enablement — architecture-rules.json flip for the three cli layers

> T002 flips tddd.enabled from false to true for cli, cli_composition, and cli_driver in architecture-rules.json. Each layer gets a catalogue_file, catalogue_spec_signal, and schema_export block.
> The cli layer is the first [[bin]] crate to be TDDD-enabled in the workspace. The schema_export targets field uses the crate name 'cli', which is the [[bin]] target. Implementers must verify that the rustdoc JSON generation path works for bin targets (nightly rustdoc --output-format json applied to a [[bin]] target) and document any required flags.
> sotp verify layers must pass after the flip (real crate names vs architecture-rules.json entries are verified by the existing check-layers gate). Full cargo make ci is deferred to T006 after the cli-layer catalogues and rustdoc baselines exist.
> Depends on T001 (DataRole codec must handle the new variants before any TDDD signal evaluation is attempted on the new layers).

- [x] **T002**: architecture-rules.json TDDD flip — set tddd.enabled: true for cli, cli_composition, and cli_driver layers. Add catalogue_file, catalogue_spec_signal, and schema_export blocks for each layer: cli uses crate name 'cli' with [[bin]] target (first [[bin]] TDDD instance in the workspace; verify rustdoc --document-private-items or equivalent bin-target flag is not required — bin targets are supported by rustdoc JSON nightly; note in the schema_export.targets value). Confirm sotp verify layers passes after the flip (layer definitions vs Cargo.toml workspace members). Full cargo make ci is deferred to T006 after the cli-layer catalogues and rustdoc baselines exist. Depends on T001. (`3cd31834434dca48c5806049696a223e6af7a97f`)

### S3 — Lint config — initial expansion and forbidden-role correction

> T003 introduced the KindLayerConstraint and NoRoleInMethodSignature rules for CompositionRoot and PrimaryAdapter, and extended Dto/FreeFunction/ErrorType rules for the three new cli layers. It was committed against the pre-revision ADR D3, whose PrimaryAdapter forbidden_roles list was broader than the updated ADR 1420 D3 / IN-03 / AC-04 exact list.
> T007 corrects this by normalizing NoRoleInMethodSignature.forbidden_roles in both .harness/catalogue-lint/presets/ddd-strict.json and .harness/catalogue-lint/config.json to ["Entity", "AggregateRoot", "ValueObject", "Repository", "SecondaryPort", "UseCase", "Interactor", "Command", "Query"]. Per ADR 1420 D3 (revised post-Phase 1), PrimaryAdapter is expected to depend on ApplicationService (the application-level DIP contract); forbidding it via NoRoleInMethodSignature would cause the five Arc<dyn *Service> constructors in T008-T013 to fail lint. After T007, AC-04 is satisfied.
> Depends on T003 (T007 is a targeted follow-up to the lint config T003 introduced).

- [x] **T003**: Lint config — add KindLayerConstraint and NoRoleInMethodSignature rules for CompositionRoot and PrimaryAdapter to .harness/catalogue-lint/presets/ddd-strict.json. Rules added: (1) CompositionRoot -> KindLayerConstraint { permitted_layers: ["cli_composition"] }; (2) PrimaryAdapter -> KindLayerConstraint { permitted_layers: ["cli_driver"] }; (3) PrimaryAdapter -> NoRoleInMethodSignature { forbidden_roles: ["Entity", "AggregateRoot", "ValueObject", "DomainService", "Specification", "Factory", "DomainEvent", "EventPolicy", "Repository", "SecondaryPort", "SpecificationPort", "UseCase", "Interactor", "Command", "Query", "ApplicationService"] }. Note: the initial implementation's forbidden_roles list is broader than the updated ADR 1420 D3 / IN-03 / AC-04 exact list. The follow-up normalization is addressed in T007. Also updated Dto and FreeFunction KindLayerConstraint rules and added ErrorType rule. Depends on T001. (`6f1ab16536e0073e688369981753b0d98e8e7954`)
- [ ] **T007**: Lint config fix — normalize PrimaryAdapter NoRoleInMethodSignature.forbidden_roles in .harness/catalogue-lint/presets/ddd-strict.json and .harness/catalogue-lint/config.json to the exact ADR 1420 D3 / IN-03 / AC-04 list: ["Entity", "AggregateRoot", "ValueObject", "Repository", "SecondaryPort", "UseCase", "Interactor", "Command", "Query"]. Remove the legacy extra entries "DomainService", "Specification", "Factory", "DomainEvent", "EventPolicy", "SpecificationPort", and "ApplicationService" from that rule. Per updated ADR 1420 D3, ApplicationService is NOT forbidden in PrimaryAdapter method signatures: cli_driver PrimaryAdapter must depend on ApplicationService (the application-level contract) rather than SecondaryPort per DIP. The KindLayerConstraint on ApplicationService (permitted only in usecase) already prevents ApplicationService from being declared in cli_driver; NoRoleInMethodSignature must not block the legitimate signature dependency. After this fix, sotp track lint must pass for ArchDriver/ConventionsDriver/FileDriver/PlanDriver/VerifyDriver (all take Arc<dyn *Service> in new()), and AC-04 is satisfied. Expected diff size: one forbidden_roles list update in each of the two config files. Depends on T003 (which introduced the broader rule list).

### S4 — Convention doc update — R1 matrix columns and rows for cli layers

> T004 extends the type-designer-kind-selection.md R1 layer-kind compatibility table to include the three new TDDD columns (cli / cli_composition / cli_driver) and two new role rows (CompositionRoot / PrimaryAdapter).
> The matrix is a copy of the ADR 1420 D3 allowlist decisions — not the decision venue. All forbidden combinations and ONLY-qualified placements are filled in for all existing and new roles across the three new columns.
> The v5 roles note in the convention preamble is updated to reflect 17 DataRole variants (15 + CompositionRoot + PrimaryAdapter).
> Depends on T001 (DataRole must define the variants before the matrix entry can be authoritative).

PrimaryAdapter: cli=forbidden, cli_composition=forbidden, cli_driver=ONLY (and forbidden in domain/usecase/infrastructure). Existing rows: Dto — add cli=OK, cli_composition=forbidden, cli_driver=OK. ErrorType — add cli=OK, cli_composition=OK, cli_driver=forbidden. FreeFunction — add cli=OK, cli_composition=forbidden, cli_driver=OK. SecondaryAdapter — add cli=forbidden, cli_composition=forbidden, cli_driver=forbidden. All other roles not in the allowlist for cli-system layers are forbidden in all three new columns. Update the v5 roles note in the preamble to reflect 17 DataRole variants post this track. Depends on T001 (CompositionRoot/PrimaryAdapter must be defined before the matrix is authoritative). (`6f1ab16536e0073e688369981753b0d98e8e7954`)

### S5 — Type catalogue authoring for cli, cli_composition, and cli_driver

> T005 authored all three layer-level type catalogues (cli-types.json, cli_composition-types.json, cli_driver-types.json) at schema_version 5.
> The Phase 2 type-designer pass extended the catalogues with the ApplicationService/Interactor types for all five driver pairs: ArchService, ConventionsService, FileService, PlannerService, VerifyService (ApplicationService role) and corresponding *Interactor structs in usecase; modified ArchDriver, ConventionsDriver, FileDriver, VerifyDriver (modify action) and added PlanDriver, PlanInput in cli_driver; modified ArchCompositionRoot, ConventionsCompositionRoot, FileCompositionRoot, VerifyCompositionRoot and added PlanCompositionRoot in cli_composition. Also added PlannerPort (SecondaryPort), PlanRunOutput (Dto), PlannerPortError (ErrorType) in usecase.
> The catalogue files are considered complete for Phase 3. Source files implementing these types are authored in T008-T013.
> Depends on T002 and T003.

- [x] **T005**: Type catalogue authoring for cli, cli_composition, and cli_driver layers (completed by Phase 2 type-designer). All three layer catalogues (cli-types.json, cli_composition-types.json, cli_driver-types.json) have been drafted at schema_version 5. cli catalogue: CliError (ErrorType), all public clap command/args/filter types as Dto, pub free functions as FreeFunction. cli_composition catalogue: CompositionError (ErrorType), all per-context *CompositionRoot structs (CompositionRoot), action:delete tombstones for CommandOutcome/tee_stderr_to_file/build_codex_read_only_invocation removed from this layer. cli_driver catalogue: CommandOutcome (Dto), *Driver structs (PrimaryAdapter), *Input types (Dto), format_pair_status (FreeFunction). New additions from IN-08/IN-09 type-designer pass: PlanInput (add, Dto) and PlanDriver (add, PrimaryAdapter) in cli_driver; PlanCompositionRoot (add, CompositionRoot) in cli_composition; ArchDriver/ConventionsDriver/FileDriver/VerifyDriver (modify, from Arc<*Port> to Arc<*Service> dependency); ArchCompositionRoot/ConventionsCompositionRoot/FileCompositionRoot/VerifyCompositionRoot (modify, updated wire chain). Depends on T002 and T003. (`3cd31834434dca48c5806049696a223e6af7a97f`)

### S6 — ApplicationService / Interactor implementation — five driver-port pairs

> T008-T013 implement the source code for all five ApplicationService / Interactor pairs declared in the type catalogues. T008-T011 handle the four simpler pairs (Arch, Conventions, File, Verify) where the Interactor is a pure delegation wrapper. T012-T013 handle the Planner pair in two sub-tasks: T012 implements PlannerPort/PlannerService/PlannerInteractor/CodexPlannerAdapter in the usecase and infrastructure layers; T013 wires PlanDriver and PlanCompositionRoot in the delivery layers and strips plan_input_from_args application logic from apps/cli.
> The split follows the thin-bin constraint (ADR 1328 D5 / IN-08): apps/cli must not contain subprocess management or application-level prompt resolution after T013. Each task is scoped to keep the diff under 500 lines.
> Tasks that expose Arc<dyn *Service> through PrimaryAdapter new() signatures depend on T007 (lint config must allow those signatures before sotp track lint can pass): T008-T011 and T013. T012 is the Planner usecase/infrastructure task and depends on T001 because PlannerPort / PlannerService role registration must exist before those usecase catalogue roles can be implemented. T013 also depends on T012 because PlannerService/PlannerInteractor must exist before PlanDriver can reference them.

Update apps/cli-driver/src/arch.rs: change ArchDriver's field from Arc<dyn ArchPort> to Arc<dyn ArchService> and update new() accordingly. Update apps/cli-composition/src/arch.rs: update ArchCompositionRoot.arch_driver() wire chain to FsArchAdapter -> ArchInteractor -> ArchDriver. All three files must compile and cargo make ci must pass after this task. Expected diff: ~80-150 lines total across usecase/cli_driver/cli_composition. Depends on T007 (lint config must accept Arc<dyn ArchService> in ArchDriver::new before sotp track lint passes).

All three files must compile and cargo make ci must pass after this task. Expected diff: ~80-150 lines total. Depends on T007.

Also implement CodexPlannerAdapter in libs/infrastructure/src/codex_planner.rs implementing PlannerPort: contains the subprocess spawn, stderr tee, and log-file write logic currently in apps/cli-composition/src/plan.rs or apps/cli/src/commands/plan/codex_local.rs. cargo make ci must pass after this task. Remove or encapsulate any subprocess / I/O logic remaining in apps/cli-composition/src/ that was part of the pre-refactor plan flow. cargo make ci must pass after this task. Expected diff: ~150-280 lines across cli_driver/cli/cli_composition. Depends on T007 and T012.

### S7 — Baseline capture for new TDDD layers and final CI gate

> T006 captures the rustdoc JSON baselines for cli, cli_composition, and cli_driver (via bin/sotp track baseline-capture or the cargo make equivalent). The [[bin]] target edge case for the cli layer is the primary implementation risk: verify that cargo +nightly rustdoc --output-format json on a [[bin]] target produces usable rustdoc JSON and that bin/sotp signal calc-impl-catalog can consume it (AC-09).
> After successful baseline captures, runs cargo make ci (fmt-check + clippy + nextest + deny + check-layers + verify-*) and fixes all remaining issues.
> sotp track lint is run against all six active catalogues (domain, usecase, infrastructure, cli, cli_composition, cli_driver). sotp track lint with a deliberately misconfigured entry (CompositionRoot in cli_driver, PrimaryAdapter in cli_composition) must produce violations (AC-08 enforcement confirmation).
> bin/sotp verify plan-artifact-refs is run as the final Phase 3 gate. AC-10 (cargo make ci all-green) is the final acceptance criterion for this section.
> Depends on T005 and all tasks in S6 (T007-T013).

- [~] **T006**: Baseline capture and CI gate. Capture rustdoc JSON baselines for cli, cli_composition, and cli_driver layers: run bin/sotp track baseline-capture (or the equivalent cargo make workflow) for each of the three layers now that tddd.enabled is true in architecture-rules.json. Handle the [[bin]] target edge case for cli: verify that the sotp signal calc-impl-catalog command can resolve the cli bin crate's rustdoc output and produce a signal. Fix any baseline-capture issues specific to [[bin]] targets. Run cargo make ci (fmt-check + clippy + nextest + deny + check-layers + verify-*) and fix all remaining issues. sotp track lint must pass for all six active catalogues (domain, usecase, infrastructure, cli, cli_composition, cli_driver); the infrastructure catalogue includes the thin-bin refactor's CodexPlannerAdapter and must lint cleanly. Run sotp verify plan-artifact-refs as the final gate. Depends on T005 and T007-T013.
